notes:
Preview build 2026-06-02-cce3eacc49d2

Built from `cce3eacc49d2` on `master`.
Base stable: v0.6.6
Compare: https://github.com/ogulcancelik/herdr/compare/v0.6.6...cce3eacc49d281fd087ebf0d43eea3e08038033f

### Added
- Add preview update channel
- Make claude codex opencode hooks session-only
- Add github copilot cli integration (#386)
- Keep remote bridge alive with an ssh config keepalive fallback (#355)
- Detect kilo code cli
- Add configurable right-click passthrough
- Add expanded sidebar collapse control (#291)

### Fixed
- Allow preview publish after master moves
- Tolerate macos socket timeout setup failure
- Shorten handoff ownership ack wait
- Return to bottom after copy mode exit (#410)
- Publish preview manifest with bot token
- Accept static aarch64 preview artifact packaging
- Resolve git branch names in reftable repos (#423)
- Preserve preview docs navigation
- Resume restored agents across background panes
- Make darwin nix package find sdk tools (#407)
- Answer xtgettcap queries in panes
- Preserve toasts during retained renders
- Detect kiro subagent approvals
- Restore agents through pane shells
- Support fish remote bootstrap
- Derive pane selection highlight colors
- Clarify update restart prompts
- Answer osc 4 palette queries
- Wake pty actor for queued input
- Remove update star prompt
- Preserve linewise copy selection (#389)
- Unify update-ready release notes scrolling
- Request missing issue environment details

### Performance
- Retain terminal render updates

### Maintenance
- Skip live handoff tests on macos
- Serialize live handoff nextest tests
- Show slow nextest tests
- Speed up ghostty scrollback limit test
- Skip ci for contributor approvals
- Update libghostty vendor
- Limit nix workflow triggers
- Add discussion templates
- Route feature intake to discussions
